rationale.root_cause: The response correctly identifies the defect at line 743 in src/be_vm.c, where the FLIP operation uses arithmetic negation instead of bitwise negation.
rationale.local_fix: The response suggests changing the line from `-a->v.i` to `~a->v.i`, which matches the developer patch.
rationale.global_fix: The response explains the root cause as a copy-paste error and suggests creating a macro for unary operations to prevent similar bugs, demonstrating understanding of the underlying issue.
